cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Thomas could have gone to the football field. The key here is to look at all the times Thomas was seen doing other things and see when he was free. Also, the football field closes after 9pm, so he must have gone before that. First, let me list out all the times Thomas was seen: - 8am to 10am: fixing computer at the store (David) - 10am to 12pm: buying lunch at the deli (Jennifer) - 12pm to 2pm: walking towards Statue of Liberty (Lisa) - 2pm to 5pm: buying a phone (Sarah) - 6pm to 9pm: buying a bike (Kimberly) So between 8am and 10am, he was at the computer store. Then from 10am to 12pm, he was at the deli. Then from 12pm to 2pm, walking towards the statue. Then from 2pm to 5pm, buying a phone. Then from 6pm to 9pm, buying a bike. So the times when he wasn't seen doing anything are: - Between 5pm and 6pm. Because after buying the phone from 2-5pm, there's no mention until 6pm when he's buying a bike. So he's free from 5pm to 6pm. Also, the football field is closed after 9pm. But he was buying a bike from 6pm to 9pm, so he can't go after 9pm. But the question says "could they have gone" meaning when was he free and the field was open. Looking at the options: (A) 12pm to 2pm – he was walking towards the statue, so no (B) 8am to 10am – he was at the computer store, so no (C) 2pm to 5pm – he was buying a phone, so no (D) 5pm to 6pm – he was free, and the field is
